issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.
The skill is limited to Apple Silicon Macs, not cross-platform.

scenarios.name: Batch image captioning to CSV with Pixtral 4-bit
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reaches for transformers AutoModel or cloud GPT-4V and misses the mlx-vlm import surface; treatment uses load/generate, apply_chat_template with config=model.config, the mlx-community 4-bit model id, and csv.DictWriter as documented.

scenarios.name: LoRA fine-tuning Pixtral then inferring with the adapter
scenarios.rationale: Baseline pivots to HuggingFace peft/Trainer with bitsandbytes which is not what mlx-vlm provides; treatment runs python -m mlx_vlm.lora with the documented flags and python -m mlx_vlm.generate --adapter-path for inference, using the JSONL image+conversations schema.
